visible.text: A neatly typed research note lays on a nearby surgical tray.

readable.text:
Subject: Operation on Test Subject NT-589-0006 
Message: Today marks the scheduled implantation of Subject NT-589-0006. Our previous attempts have proven as costly failures.
Upper management however, insists our continued experimentation is vitally necessary. 
Dr. K remains optimistic that this strain will finally be the one to provide us the unfathomable
regenerative potential we have been searching for all these years. 
Subject currently remains stable under sedation. 
Important Reminder: Increase immunosuppressant dosage IMMEDIATELY after implantation.

takeable.text: You take the research note in your hand, and put it in your inventory.

examinable.text:
The paper appears spotless and professionally formatted. 
The laboratory’s insignia is displayed on the top left corner of the page.
A handwritten note on the back reads: "If this fails, I’m next."

visible.text: An envelope containing a folded handwritten letter sits inside an open desk drawer.

readable.text:
To my beloved David,
I know your work keeps you away from us more often than either of us can stand, but I hope that you know how proud I am of you. 
Alice graduated elementary school today. She looked so beautiful walking across that little stage. 
Even though she tried to hide it, I just know how much she misses you. 
She told me she understands that “Daddy is helping save people,” and I couldn’t help but cry. 
I know how important your research is. Not just to your company, but the entire world. 
You’ve always wanted to make a difference, and your effort reminds me every day how lucky I am to have you. 
Please come home safe when this project is finally over. 
All my love, 
Sophia

takeable.text: You take the personal letter in your hand, and put it in your inventory.

examinable.text:
The paper is neatly folded and delicately written in elaborate handwriting. 
There are faint water stains on it. Tucked inside the envelope is a small sticky note 
It reads only: "I’m so sorry."

visible.text: An oddly torn maintenance log is caught underneath a damaged and scorched fuse panel.

readable.text:
Maintenance Log: 
Primary breaker instability detected. 
Emergency fuse was removed to prevent systems failure. 
Replacement fuse has been relocated to  ̷ȍ̷̸̸̷̷̧͔͉̙͖͎͈̗̖̺̟̘̤̱̓͊ͭͭͣ̉ͪ̓̐̆̔ͩ͒͜͠͞v̷̶̢̮̼͙̖̤̀ͮ͑ͪͦͦͮ͘͜ͅ

takeable.text: You take the torn document, and place it in your inventory.

visible.text: There is a message smeared on one of the observation windows.

examinable.text:
This message appears to have been smeared in an extreme panic. 
Some of the barely legible characters trail off, as though whoever wrote this was interrupted.

visible.text: An official memo is pinned onto a nearby terminal.

readable.text:
EMERGENCY NOTICE: 
Following containment failure in Sector V, all personnel are ordered to
initiate full lockdown procedures according to Code 776 of the official laboratory protocol.
Power to security doors may still require manual rerouting. 
 Under NO circumstances should unauthorized personnel access Greenhouse Sector Q. 
Failure to comply will result immediate termination.

examinable.text:
The document is printed on officially stylized card stock.
A large red “URGENT” stamp has been sloppily applied to the paper’s top cover.

visible.text: There is a red keycard amidst the clutter.

usable.text: You put the red keycard into the reader. It fits perfectly!

takeable.text:
You take the keycard.
This might be able to grant access to higher level restricted sectors.

examinable.text:
This card appears to have seen better days.
Most text has faded along with the emblem belonging to the laboratory.
The only legible text reads "Sector V Senior Research Authorization"

visible.text: A severely crumpled piece of scrap paper lies next to the body.

readable.text:
I’ve ran out of time. 
They said the infection was controllable, how naive we all were to believe them yet again. 
It’s spreading faster than any of us could have projected, despite countless simulations. 
If you are reading this, thenfhhs̸̶̷̶t̴̴̵̴̸̴c̴h̶̶a̸̸̸n̴̵g̷̴̸̵e̴̴̵̶̴̴d̷.̷

takeable.text: You take the crumpled paper in your hand, and put it in your inventory.

examinable.text:
The paper is stained a distinct red color, probably handled by severely bloodied hands. 
The handwriting becomes severely more frantic near towards the end.

visible.text: The deceased scientist grips an electrical fuse in his bloodied hand.

usable.text:
You insert the fuse into the breaker box.
The facility slowly comes back to life as the emergency power flows throughout the sector.
Somewhere nearby, you hear ths metallic hiss of a heavy door unlocking.

takeable.text: You carefully pry the fuse out of the corpse's stiff fingers.

examinable.text:
The fuse is scorched along its edges but still appears to be functional
Streaks of dried blood cover large portions of its glass casing.

visible.text: A storage crate is snug against the wall.

hideable.text: You pry open the lid and squeeze inside the crate, doing your best to hold your breath.

examinable.text: It looks cramped, and dark. Just large enough to fit you inside.

visible.text: A rusted maintenance locker stands with its door cracked open.

hideable.text: You push yourself into the locker and hold the door shut. Doing your best to remain still.

examinable.text: The thin metal walls are cold to the touch, and the air is unbearably dusty and stale.

visible.text: An overgrown shed holding gardening equipment is positioned nearby.

hideable.text: You take shelter quickly inside the shed.

examinable.text: The interior is crammed with gardening tools that have severely corroded.

visible.text: A very damaged generator is almost entirely consumed by roots and foliage.

examinable.text: The generator looks like it will need some special components to repair.

visible.text: A slightly damaged circuit regulator is partly visible from beneath the damp foliage.

usable.text: You repair the generator with the circuit regulator.

takeable.text:
You reach for the regulator and wrestle it from the ground. 
It appears vital for repairing a generator.

examinable.text:
Erosion covers nearly its entire surface.
Thankfully the electrical contacts aren’t damaged too much.

visible.text: A rusted hydraulic valve lies near a damaged irrigation pipe.

usable.text: You repair the generator with the hydraulic valve.

takeable.text:
You grab the hydraulic valve.
It appears vital for repairing a generator.

examinable.text: Its dense steel frame has been through a lot, but it can be used as a replacement valve for a generator.

visible.text: A power coupler lays on the ground beside a destroyed maintenance panel.

usable.text: You repair the generator with the power coupler.

takeable.text:
You pick up the power coupler. 
Though its is worn and unstable, it looks necessary for restoring electrical currents.

examinable.text:
Multiple wires dangle oddly from it.
It's still usable to replace a blown out coupler on a generator.

visible.text: A utility key on the ground glimmers in the faint lighting.

usable.text:
You insert the utility key into the lock.
The metal grating door swings open.

takeable.text: You pick up the maintenance key.

examinable.text: The strap holding the maintenance key appears to be snapped, but the key itself appears functional.

visible.text: A metal saw hangs on a tool rack.

usable.text: You saw through the metal bars. Your freedom is only a step away.

examinable.text: The metal saw is durable enough to cut through steel.
